name: Berg en Dal (Netherlands)
description: A white field with a black canton bearing a red lion within gold roundels, a red panel at the lower hoist with a gold rose, and a red serpentine band across the flag.
history: Flag of the municipality of Berg en Dal in the province of Gelderland, formed in 2015.

features.role: a black canton with a red lion bordered by gold roundels
a red panel at the lower hoist bearing a gold rose
a red serpentine band across the flag
